title: Customer Journey Owner (m/f/d)
location: Koblenz, Germany (inferred from benefits mentioning Koblenz canteen/gym)
required_skills: Several years experience in customer experience, service design, or customer operations
Preferably in software, SaaS, or IT services context
Experience with CX platforms: Salesforce, ServiceNow, Zendesk, Freshdesk or comparable
Data-driven working style: journey analytics, NPS feedback, support data
Strong process-oriented thinking with affinity for automation and standardisation
bonus_skills: Background in business administration, business psychology, business informatics, or service design
Experience coordinating multi-country rollouts (up to 19 countries)
matched_skills: KPI framework design and performance reporting (HSBC, Hapag-Lloyd)
Customer journey analysis: analysed customer journey and user research data at Hapag-Lloyd
Cross-functional stakeholder coordination across product, engineering, and customer teams
Data storytelling: translated complex programme data into structured insight narratives (HSBC)
Multi-market coordination experience (EMEA, APAC at HSBC)
missing_skills: No experience with CX platforms (Salesforce, ServiceNow, Zendesk, Freshdesk)
No direct customer-facing service operations or support function management
No NPS target ownership or early resolution rate management
No SaaS or IT services context for customer experience
No automation or self-service system design experience
core_responsibilities: End-to-end responsibility for customer journey in support and service
Steering CX metrics: NPS target +45, early resolution rate >80%, 30% reduction in repeat contacts
Selection, configuration and optimisation of CX tools (portals, self-service, routing, feedback)
Systematic identification and elimination of friction points along the journey
Design of self-service and deflection mechanisms
Coordinating rollout of new journey standards across up to 19 countries
recommended_emphasis: Highlight the customer journey and user research analysis work at Hapag-Lloyd as the closest match to CX ownership
Emphasise the multi-market experience from HSBC (EMEA/APAC) as evidence for 19-country coordination capability
Note the gap in platform experience honestly — no Salesforce/ServiceNow/Zendesk background is a significant gap
A cover letter should address the SaaS/IT service context gap and articulate transferable skills from shipping/fintech contexts
summary: Match score is 27.3 (weak_match). The candidate has relevant customer journey analysis and KPI reporting experience from Hapag-Lloyd and multi-market coordination from HSBC, but lacks the critical requirements: CX platform experience (Salesforce/ServiceNow/Zendesk), SaaS/IT services context, and direct ownership of NPS and service resolution metrics. The role also explicitly prefers candidates from leading universities with strong service design backgrounds. Apply only with a strong cover letter bridging the technical platform gap.
